results.title: DDFA selection to represent at 5th Nagaland Futsal Club Championship
results.description: DIMAPUR, JUN 5 (NPN): Dimapur District Football Association (DDFA) has announced to conduct Dimapur District Futsal Club Championship 2026 on June 10 at the State Stadium, Dimapur, which will serve as the official selection tournament to determine the club that will represent Dimapur at the 5th Nagaland Futsal Club Championship 2026.The championship will provide a [...] The post DDFA selection to represent at 5th Nagaland Futsal Club Championship first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea

results.title: Heat Stress In Children's Sports: UAE Doctors, Parents Weigh Risks As Temperatures Climb
results.description: (MENAFN - Khaleej Times) Pediatricians emphasised that parents should look beyond performance and focus on behavioural cues; some children may hide symptoms and try to push through when playing ...
